---
title: "深度学习"
subtitle: "从零开始Deep Learning"
listing:
  - id: lessons
    contents: lessons
    sort:
      - "date desc"
    categories: true
    filter-ui: [title, categories]
    type: default
    page-size: 1000
    fields: [title, description, date, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
